channel.title: Sameer Shanbhag — Blog
channel.description: Writing on software engineering, AI, and whatever else I'm building.

item.title: Hello, world — this blog is HTML all the way down
item.description: Why I store posts as plain HTML in git, and how a small design engine turns any markup into a page that matches my portfolio.

item.title: DeepSeek V4: How They Crushed the Million-Token Memory Problem
item.description: A million-token context window sounds impressive. Making it cheap enough to actually use is the hard part — and the engineering behind it is worth understanding properly.

item.title: The Local Model Plus Outsourcing Bet Against Frontier API Pricing
item.description: Working through the cost architecture and where the latency math gets messy.

item.title: The AI Coding Metric Nobody Has Actually Measured
item.description: Nolan Lawson's post made me realize why 'better code' never got the marketing that 'faster code' did.

item.title: DeepSeek Reasonix and the Economics of the Agent Prompt Loop
item.description: Why 'native' KV-cache design in a coding agent makes context ordering a first-class engineering constraint, not an afterthought.
